---
title: &TITLE Leonardo Yair Correa Mendoza
last: Correa
first: Leonardo
people_group: alumni
email: "lcorrea@lcg.unam.mx"
education:
  - BSc Genomic Sciences program | LCG, UNAM
subtitle: ""
description: ""
bio: "I hold a Bsc degree from the Genomic Sciences program at LCG, UNAM. I have experience working with ancient DNA and bioinformatics pipelines, with a focus on paleogenomics, population genetics, and genetic ancestry inference. My research integrates population genetics, archaeological, and cultural context to explore the human past. I am currently undertaking a research stay as part of the Paleogenomics and Evolutionary Biology group, under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto. My current project investigates the genetic affinities, population, and social structure of individuals excavated from two prehispanic archaeological sites in México. Through the analysis of ancient DNA, this work aims to reconstruct ancestry, kinship relationships, and mobility patterns from Mexican prehispanic societies, contributing to a deeper understanding of social dynamics and population history in Mesoamerica."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lcorrea@lcg.unam.mx
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
